### 👉 Nice People Dancing To Good Music

Location: Revive Karaoke Bar @ [28 King St N, Waterloo](https://maps.app.goo.gl/5r3mSMYBSawvvNGh9)

#### 9:30pm-2am

* [Kasia](https://on.soundcloud.com/rzWuG7Ev6275rXecqt)
* [Sophia Alexandra](https://www.instagram.com/sophia.alexandra.music/)
* [Coy Haste](https://www.instagram.com/coyhaste/)

[Info](https://www.instagram.com/p/DU_F1rfEQFuZXFuV1W61Sgp5aB2n4kifK9I6h00/)
